{{Quote|Renei and Wunana both died only three years later in the Twenty-Second Battle of Zehava. They were barely older than me.|[[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]]|<ref name="Jedi Apprentice: The Defenders of the Dead">''[[Jedi Apprentice: The Defenders of the Dead]]''</ref>}}
The '''Twenty-Second Battle of Zehava''' occurred circa [[91 BBY/Legends|91 BBY]], three years after the [[Battle of Bin]]. It was one of the many struggles of the [[Melida/Daan Civil War]] on the planet of [[Melida/Daan/Legends|Melida/Daan]]. During the battle, [[Renei]] and [[Wunana]] were killed.

==Appearances==
